---
title: "Research"
listing:
  contents: .
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: 
    categories: R
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

### Work in progresss

- `More peers, more recombination but less exploration: Evidence from software developers`

-   `When dispersed teams are more successful: Theory and evidence from software` -- with [Gábor Békes](https://sites.google.com/site/bekesg/), [Julian Hinz](https://julianhinz.com), [Miklós Koren](https://koren.mk) 

-   `Vibe Coding Kills Open Souce` -- with [Miklós Koren](https://koren.mk), [Gábor Békes](https://sites.google.com/site/bekesg/) and [Julian Hinz](https://julianhinz.com) -- [Link to Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.15494)

------------------------------------------------------------------------


### Policy Papers

- `America's Own Goal: Who Pays the Tarifs? -- with [Julian Hinz](https://julianhinz.com), [Hendrik Mahlkow](https://www.hendrikmahlkow.com), [Anna Vorwig](https://www.kielinstitut.de/experts/anna-vorwig/) -- [Link to Paper](https://www.kielinstitut.de/publications/americas-own-goal-who-pays-the-tariffs-19398/)

### Data

-   `Open Source Software Input Output linkages` -- with [Gábor Békes](https://sites.google.com/site/bekesg/), [Julian Hinz](https://julianhinz.com), [Miklós Koren](https://koren.mk)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Conference Presentations/Seminars

-   **2025**: Rethink-GSC Workshop (Gdansk) , BiGSEM Seminar (University Bielefeld) , EEA (Bordeaux) , ETSG (Milan)
-   **2024**: FIW (Vienna), BiGSEM Seminar (University Bielefeld), EEA (Rotterdam)
-   **2023**: BiGSEM Seminar (University Bielefeld) , ETSG (Guildford), Firms and Productivity Workshop (Pescara) , Kiel-Aarhus Workshop (Sandbjerg)

### Research visits

-   **2026** (January - April): University of Toronto, Toronto under supervision of Ruben Gaetani
-   **2024** (February - June): Central European University, Vienna under supervision of Miklós Koren
